programs.title: Anesthesia Technician Certificate
programs.metaDescription: 12-month Anesthesia Technician Certificate at FAHI Kenya — hybrid or physical study, clinical attachments, and career-ready perioperative training.
programs.heroImageAlt: Clinical training environment representing anesthesia and perioperative care
programs.intro: This 12-month certificate program prepares learners to assist anesthesiologists and nurse anesthetists in surgical and critical care settings. Anesthesia technicians play a crucial role in organizing, monitoring, and maintaining anesthesia equipment throughout the entire procedure, from before to after. They also support patient care by assisting with airway management, medication preparation, and safety checks in the operating room.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D+ and above (or equivalent as approved by admissions).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid — combine on-campus practical sessions with structured online learning through FAHI’s e-learning platform.
programs.feesSummary: Total program fee: Ksh 126,000. Detailed payment plans, registration fees, and optional kit costs are confirmed at enrollment.

feeRows.detail: Installment plan available — see admissions office
Included in program design; site allocation per FAHI policy
Digital resources via LMS; select print materials as advised

programs.curriculumIntro: The curriculum blends theory, simulation where available, and supervised clinical practice. Exact module titles and sequencing are published in the official program outline.
curriculumBullets: Anesthesia equipment, safety checks, and workspace preparation
Airway support and perioperative assistance protocols
Medication handling and documentation under supervision
Infection prevention and operating room standards
programs.downloadsIntro: Replace the links below with real PDFs when files are ready.
programs.employment: Graduates may work in public and private hospitals, surgical centers, maternity wards, and specialty clinics, such as those specializing in orthopedics, ENT, or ophthalmology.
programs.ctaHeadline: Apply here — start your Anesthesia Technician journey with FAHI.

programs.title: Phlebotomy Technician
programs.metaDescription: Hands-on phlebotomy training at FAHI — specimen collection, safety, and clinical readiness.
programs.heroImageAlt: Healthcare professional preparing for blood draw training
programs.intro: Develop safe, confident venipuncture and capillary collection skills for hospitals, labs, and community diagnostics. This program emphasizes infection control, patient communication, specimen handling, and quality standards aligned with clinical practice.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D+ and above (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with supervised lab hours and clinical placement.
programs.feesSummary: Fees are confirmed at enrollment. Ask admissions for current tuition and payment options.
programs.curriculumIntro: Core topics include vascular anatomy, collection techniques, complications prevention, and professional practice.
curriculumBullets: Specimen labeling and chain of care
programs.downloadsIntro: Download brochures and forms when published.
programs.employment: Graduates may support work in hospital labs, outpatient clinics, blood donation centres, and diagnostic chains.
programs.ctaHeadline: Ready to train in phlebotomy? Apply to FAHI today.

programs.title: Emergency Medical Technician (EMT)
programs.metaDescription: EMT training at FAHI — pre-hospital emergency care, life support foundations, and field readiness.
programs.intro: Prepare for frontline pre-hospital care with training in assessment, trauma and medical emergencies, communication, and ambulance operations. Practical drills and supervised clinical exposure build the confidence to respond in high-pressure settings.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE C– and above (or equivalent) — subject to FAHI admissions review.
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with mandatory skills labs and field placements.
programs.feesSummary: Program fees vary by intake. Contact admissions for the latest fee sheet.
programs.curriculumIntro: Integrated modules combine classroom theory, skills labs, and supervised clinical experience.
programs.downloadsIntro: Downloadable resources will be linked here.
programs.employment: Graduates may pursue roles supporting EMS providers, private ambulance services, industrial clinics, and event medical teams where regulations allow.
programs.ctaHeadline: Take the first step toward emergency care — apply now.

programs.title: Diploma in Nursing
programs.metaDescription: Nursing diploma pathway at FAHI — clinical skills, ethics, and workforce preparation.
programs.heroImageAlt: Nursing students in clinical learning environment
programs.intro: A comprehensive nursing diploma track focused on patient-centred care, clinical competencies, and professional values. The program combines theory, simulation, and hospital-based practice to graduate work-ready nurses aligned with local and international expectations.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE C plain and above with cluster requirements as published for each intake.
programs.modeOfStudy: Primarily on-campus with digital supplements and structured clinical rotations.
programs.feesSummary: Tuition and payment schedules are issued per academic year. Scholarships or bursaries may be advertised separately.
programs.curriculumIntro: Progressive modules build from foundations to advanced nursing care across the lifespan.
programs.employment: Graduates may seek employment in hospitals, clinics, home care, schools, and community programmes subject to regulatory registration requirements.
programs.ctaHeadline: Build a nursing career with FAHI — apply today.

programs.title: CNA / Health Support Assistant
programs.metaDescription: CNA and health support assistant training at FAHI — bedside care and caregiver skills.
programs.intro: Entry-level caregiver training covering vital signs, mobility assistance, hygiene, nutrition support, and communication. Ideal for learners beginning a career in nursing support or home-based care.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D plain and above (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with practical skills labs.
programs.feesSummary: Contact admissions for current fees and start dates.
programs.curriculumIntro: Practical modules prepare you for supervised bedside support roles.
programs.employment: Graduates may work in nursing homes, hospitals, home care agencies, and private households where regulations allow.
programs.ctaHeadline: Start your caregiver career — apply to FAHI.

programs.title: Perioperative Theatre Technician
programs.metaDescription: Theatre technology and perioperative support training at FAHI.
programs.intro: Train in sterile technique, instrumentation, OR workflows, and perioperative safety. This pathway supports learners aiming to assist surgical teams in hospital theatre departments.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D+ and above (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with mandatory theatre skills hours.
programs.feesSummary: Fees confirmed at enrollment.
programs.curriculumIntro: Sterile processing, instrumentation, and perioperative protocols.
programs.employment: Theatre departments in public and private hospitals, day surgery units, and specialty centres.
programs.ctaHeadline: Train for the operating theatre — apply now.

programs.title: EKG / ECG Technician
programs.metaDescription: Cardiac monitoring and ECG technician training at FAHI.
programs.intro: Learn rhythm recognition, electrode placement, equipment troubleshooting, and reporting standards for cardiac diagnostics in outpatient and inpatient settings.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D+ and above (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with lab practice.
programs.feesSummary: Fees confirmed at enrollment.
programs.curriculumIntro: Foundations through advanced ECG interpretation support.
programs.employment: Cardiology clinics, hospitals, diagnostic imaging centres, and occupational health programmes.
programs.ctaHeadline: Start your cardiac diagnostics pathway — apply.

programs.title: Community Health
programs.metaDescription: Community health programme at FAHI — outreach, prevention, and primary care support.
programs.intro: Prepare for roles in health promotion, disease prevention, and community-based support. The programme links classroom learning with field practice in diverse community settings.
programs.entryRequirement: Varies by certificate or diploma track — see admissions for the latest matrix.
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with community fieldwork.
programs.feesSummary: Fees depend on programme track.
programs.curriculumIntro: Community diagnosis, health education, and programme implementation.
programs.employment: NGOs, county health teams, facilities, and community-based organisations.
programs.ctaHeadline: Serve your community in health — apply to FAHI.

programs.title: Home-Based Care
programs.metaDescription: Home-based care training at FAHI — dignified support for clients at home.
programs.intro: Skills for safe personal care, chronic disease support, documentation, and family communication in home settings. Emphasises dignity, boundaries, and infection prevention.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D plain and above (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with skills demonstrations.
programs.feesSummary: Fees confirmed at enrollment.
programs.curriculumIntro: Core caregiving and safety for home environments.
programs.employment: Home care agencies, hospice support roles where applicable, and private duty assignments.
programs.ctaHeadline: Train for compassionate home care — apply.

programs.title: Mortuary Sciences
programs.metaDescription: Mortuary sciences introduction at FAHI — professional, ethical preparation.
programs.intro: Foundational study in thanatology support, ethics, biosafety, and facility procedures for learners entering mortuary services pathways under institutional supervision.
programs.entryRequirement: Minimum academic threshold and interview as published for each intake.
programs.modeOfStudy: Primarily physical with structured lab and observation components.
programs.feesSummary: Fees issued per intake.
programs.curriculumIntro: Ethics, safety, and introductory technical foundations.
programs.employment: Pathways vary by regulation; graduates may support roles in accredited facilities where permitted.
programs.ctaHeadline: Request information and apply through admissions.

programs.title: IELTS Preparation
programs.metaDescription: IELTS preparation at FAHI — academic and general training support.
programs.intro: Structured preparation for listening, reading, writing, and speaking with timed practice, feedback, and test strategies for international English exams.
programs.entryRequirement: Short placement or interview to assign level.
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with live and recorded sessions.
programs.feesSummary: Modular fees per cycle — ask admissions.
programs.curriculumIntro: Skills-based bands aligned to exam tasks.
programs.employment: Supports university admission and migration documentation goals; not a job-placement programme.
programs.ctaHeadline: Book your IELTS prep seat — apply or enquire.

programs.title: BLS / ACLS / PALS
programs.metaDescription: Life support certifications at FAHI — BLS, ACLS, and PALS pathways.
programs.intro: Provider-level courses in basic and advanced cardiovascular life support, with paediatric options where offered. Designed for clinicians and students who need recognised cards for practice sites.
programs.entryRequirement: BLS open to beginners; ACLS/PALS may require prior clinical training — confirm with calendar.
programs.modeOfStudy: In-person skills sessions with blended precoursework where applicable.
programs.feesSummary: Each certification is priced separately.
programs.curriculumIntro: AHA-aligned content where FAHI is authorised to deliver; cards issued per policy.
programs.employment: Supports employment requirements in hospitals and clinics that mandate current provider cards.
programs.ctaHeadline: Register for your next life-support course.

programs.title: Radiography & Imaging Support
programs.metaDescription: Sample programme — imaging department support, patient positioning, and safety at FAHI.
programs.heroImageAlt: Medical imaging equipment in a hospital setting
programs.intro: Introductory pathway for learners supporting diagnostic imaging teams. Covers patient preparation, basic positioning concepts, radiation safety culture, communication, and department workflows alongside supervised observation blocks.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D+ and above (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with mandatory lab and clinical observation hours.
programs.feesSummary: Sample fee row below — replace with approved figures per intake.
programs.curriculumIntro: Foundations through department-ready professional habits.
programs.downloadsIntro: Sample download row — attach real PDFs later.
programs.employment: Sample text: imaging departments, outpatient diagnostic centres, and training pathways toward further specialization where regulations allow.
programs.ctaHeadline: Sample CTA — apply to FAHI for the next intake.

programs.title: Dental Assistant
programs.metaDescription: Sample programme — chairside assistance, sterilization, and dental office readiness at FAHI.
programs.intro: Prepare for entry-level dental practice support with training in four-handed dentistry basics, instrument processing, infection control, scheduling, and patient communication within supervised clinical and lab sessions.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D+ and above (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with skills laboratory sessions.
programs.feesSummary: Tuition and kit fees are confirmed at registration.
programs.curriculumIntro: Chairside and office-ready competencies.
programs.employment: Dental clinics, hospital dental units, and orthodontic practices where assistant roles are permitted.
programs.ctaHeadline: Train as a dental assistant — apply to FAHI.

programs.title: Pharmacy Technician (Introductory)
programs.metaDescription: Sample programme — dispensary support, inventory, and pharmaceutical calculations introduction.
programs.intro: Foundational study for pharmacy support roles: classification of medicines, dispensing workflow under supervision, inventory basics, calculations, and regulatory awareness aligned with local practice settings.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE C– and above including Mathematics and English (or equivalent).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with case-based online modules.
programs.feesSummary: Fees published per intake cycle.
programs.curriculumIntro: Dispensary-ready knowledge and professional conduct.
programs.employment: Retail and hospital pharmacies, wholesale depots, and NGO medical logistics where technician cadres are recognised.
programs.ctaHeadline: Start your pharmacy support pathway.

programs.title: Health Records & Informatics
programs.metaDescription: Sample programme — electronic records, coding basics, and health data literacy.
programs.intro: Build skills for digital health environments: documentation standards, privacy principles, basic analytics literacy, and interoperability concepts for hospitals and clinics transitioning to paper-light workflows.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE D+ and above; basic computer literacy recommended.
programs.modeOfStudy: Hybrid with live online sessions and on-campus workshops.
programs.feesSummary: Modular pricing possible — confirm with admissions.
programs.curriculumIntro: Data stewardship in patient-centred care.
programs.employment: Health information departments, M&E units, insurance claims support, and digital health startups.
programs.ctaHeadline: Upskill in health informatics — apply today.

programs.title: Infection Prevention & Control (IPC)
programs.metaDescription: Sample short programme — IPC fundamentals for healthcare teams.
programs.heroImageAlt: Hand hygiene and infection control in healthcare
programs.intro: Strengthen facility-wide IPC culture through evidence-based modules on hand hygiene, environmental cleaning, outbreak readiness, surveillance basics, and audit tools for nurses, support staff, and team leads.
programs.entryRequirement: Open to healthcare workers and students in health programmes (sample rule).
programs.modeOfStudy: Hybrid with skills demonstrations on campus.
programs.feesSummary: Cohort-based fee — ask FAHI calendar.
programs.curriculumIntro: IPC essentials for frontline teams.
programs.employment: Supports roles in IPC link nursing, quality offices, and facility accreditation preparation teams.
programs.ctaHeadline: Join the next IPC cohort.

programs.title: Social Work & Community Development
programs.metaDescription: Sample programme — community assessment, case management basics, and ethics.
programs.intro: Explore social welfare systems, community assessment, participatory development, counselling micro-skills, and ethical documentation for work with vulnerable populations in partnership with local agencies.
programs.entryRequirement: KCSE C– and above with cluster guidance per prospectus (sample).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with field practicum blocks.
programs.feesSummary: Annual fee structure issued per academic year.
programs.curriculumIntro: Theory and field-integrated social work foundations.
programs.employment: NGOs, county social services, schools, and community programmes — subject to regulatory registration where required.
programs.ctaHeadline: Serve communities through FAHI.

programs.title: KCSE Bridging (Sciences)
programs.metaDescription: Sample bridging programme — strengthen Biology/Chemistry for health programmes.
programs.intro: Targeted bridging in core sciences and exam skills for learners who need to meet minimum cluster thresholds for health-related diplomas and certificates at FAHI or partner institutions.
programs.entryRequirement: Open to learners with prior KCSE or equivalent; placement test may apply (sample).
programs.modeOfStudy: Physical or Hybrid with weekly assessments.
programs.feesSummary: Priced per subject module.
programs.curriculumIntro: Accelerated review and exam technique.
programs.employment: Progression into FAHI health programmes or further academic pathways — not a terminal employment credential.
programs.ctaHeadline: Bridge your grades — enquire or apply.

programs.title: ASCPi / International Lab Prep (Sample)
programs.metaDescription: Sample exam-preparation track for international laboratory certification goals.
programs.intro: Structured review for international exam routes (sample): laboratory operations, discipline-specific theory drills, timed practice, and study planning for candidates who already meet exam body eligibility rules.
programs.entryRequirement: Candidates must meet exam-body eligibility independently; FAHI provides preparatory training only (sample disclaimer).
programs.modeOfStudy: Hybrid with live tutorials and question banks.
programs.feesSummary: Package fee excludes exam registration paid to external bodies.
programs.curriculumIntro: High-yield review and test strategy.
programs.employment: Supports eligibility for international roles where certification is recognised — outcomes depend on individual exam success.
programs.ctaHeadline: Prepare with FAHI — apply or book consultation.
